name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
setup: Stand with dumbbells at sides, palms facing each other
Slight forward lean (~10 degrees), core braced
execution: Raise dumbbells out to sides until parallel to floor
Pause briefly at top, lower under control
common_mistakes: Raising too high (engages traps, not delts)
Internal rotation at top (thumb-down position — impingement risk)
cues: Pour water from a jug at the top (slight thumb-down)
Slow down — this is about control, not weight
recommendation: Light weight, high reps (12-20), strict form
